reviews.author: David Steinberg
reviews.text: Nice people and I’m sure it was once a nice island. But the pollution is horrifying. Here are two photos. The first is from the waterfront of our eco resort. And the second is from what has been referred to as one of the pristine northern beaches. No one dared swim in the water.

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: Really impressive, the beaches are so beautiful, emerald around the island. Coconuts, stones and white sand. Seafood is much cheaper than Phu Quoc and very fresh.

reviews.author: Blue Fam
reviews.text: Beautiful Island. Clear water. Strong wind. Many beautiful beaches. The road around the island is beautiful. Love the coconut gardens in the island. Should not litter.

reviews.author: Phạm Huy Hạnh
reviews.text: Beautifull place with good view, good food (low price). Not too many visitters so this place is still a bit clean. Not too many place to play round so 2 days is a good amount of time to spend there. Love people there too, friendly and kind

reviews.author: Hien Nguyen
reviews.text: Hon Son Island in Kien Giang is truly a hidden paradise, blessed with unspoiled natural beauty. Surrounded by turquoise waters and soft sandy beaches, the island offers a tranquil escape far from the busy mainland. What impresses visitors most are the crystal-clear seas, colorful coral reefs, and the peaceful fishing villages that still retain their traditional charm. One of the highlights of Hon Son is its lush mountains and scenic trekking routes. Climbing to Ma Thien Lanh peak gives you a panoramic view of the entire island, where the sky, sea, and greenery blend together beautifully. The coconut-lined beaches such as Bai Bang and Bai Bo are perfect for relaxing, swimming, or simply enjoying the sunset. Unlike more commercialized islands, Hon Son remains relatively untouched, which makes it even more appealing. Life here is slow and simple, and the locals are friendly and welcoming. For me, Hon Son is not just beautiful—it is a reminder of how precious Vietnam’s natural treasures are, and why they should be preserved.

reviews.author: Tap Nguyen
reviews.text: That's okay. The average price in Son island is quite expensive

reviews.author: almost enough.
reviews.text: Delicious and fresh seafood. When i came, the sea urchins were out of stock and the owner dived and caught the fresh ones for us Fresh seafood go with mỡ hành or mỡ chài are good choices, you will never get wrong with this cooking method Please give it a try to this restaurant, so much cheaper in the center area

reviews.author: Kian Nguyen
reviews.text: Ok even it is quite dirty because of garbage

reviews.author: Andy Ha
reviews.text: Nice place for relaxing and local pepple are very kind. Good seafood very fresh !!!!! Oneday I will come back agin

reviews.author: Trần Tấn Hiệp
reviews.text: Wonderful View, food and people

reviews.author: Tran Mai Phong
reviews.text: The most peaceful place i'd been. You'll be amazed how beautiful an untouched natural beach can be. Electricity on the island only supplies for 5 hours per day, so be ready before you decided to experience.

reviews.author: Nguyen Hien
reviews.text: This is a beautifull island with fresh seafood. It has one of the most beautiful beach, Bãi Bàng had a wonderful view. A beach with lots of coconut trees beside a mountain. Water is very fresh with white sand. Owner of the beach organize it very well, providing good services with reasonable prices. They make it a great places for selfie and keep it clean. People on the island are very friendly except the centre market. Food there is expensive with low quality. Motobike rent is expensive compared to other tourism place.

reviews.author: Dark SV
reviews.text: Peaceful, Best views, Cheapest price,... its a great place!

reviews.author: Dung Nguyen
reviews.text: Decent place for couples or anyone who want an isolated space for relaxing. However, the food price isn't very cheap, which you should prepare your money first :)))

reviews.author: Tien Mai
reviews.text: Take the mountain road to enjoy the island spectacular views. Just breathtaking!

reviews.author: Nicolas Devos
reviews.text: Most places are empty. Dirty beaches. No clear water

reviews.author: Đức Đặng Minh
reviews.text: Still have wild places to enjoy natural air and sightseeing

reviews.author: Tfarm
reviews.text: Great island with nice beaches and a lot of escape away places.

reviews.author: Phạm Dương Khol
reviews.text: I had a lot of good memories there

reviews.author: Long Ha
reviews.text: Wonderful island with beach, moutain...
